title: Opencode integrity check present
expected: Opencode binary download MUST verify integrity (sha256, sig, attestation).
evidence:
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64

FROM golang:1.25-bookworm AS redact-builder

ARG TARGETARCH

WORKDIR /src

ARG GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct
ENV GOPROXY=${GOPROXY}

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} \
    go build -trimpath -o /out/redact ./cmd/redact

FROM golang:1.25-bookworm AS agentd-builder

ARG TARGETARCH

WORKDIR /src

ARG GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct
ENV GOPROXY=${GOPROXY}

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} \
    go build -trimpath -o /out/workspace-agentd ./cmd/workspace-agentd

FROM debian:bookworm-slim

ARG TARGETARCH

# Override to use a different release: --build-arg OPENCODE_VERSION=<version>
# Pinned to 1.15.12 (May 2026) — validated against the proxy code in
# api/internal/handlers/proxy.go and session_tracker.go. See worklog 0070
# for the full v1.2.27→v1.15.12 impact analysis
